name: Spellbook of the Grand Circle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>書</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Add 4 "Charmer" monsters with different Attributes from your Deck, GY, and/or banishment to your hand, then shuffle 2 cards from your hand into the Deck. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using "Charmer" or "Familiar-Possessed" monsters from your hand or field, also your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when a monster is Fusion Summoned this way. You can only use each effect of "Spellbook of the Grand Circle" once per turn.
eff: Add 4 "Charmer" monsters with different Attributes from your Deck, GY, and/or banishment to your hand, then shuffle 2 cards from your hand into the Deck. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using "Charmer" or "Familiar-Possessed" monsters from your hand or field, also your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when a monster is Fusion Summoned this way. You can only use each effect of "Spellbook of the Grand Circle" once per turn.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: Spirit Charmers (All-Foil Edition)

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
Returns from your hand to your Deck
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Can only use certain Fusion Materials
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
